reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B) focuses on access authorization, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC controls. Ensuring no cluster-wide administrative privileges are granted unnecessarily, enforcing least privilege, and managing service account tokens are critical for access control in Kubernetes.
title: 164_308_a_4_ii_c: 164.308(a)(4)(ii)(B) Access authorization
